per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yes. As I mentioned, last night I woke up with night sweats, soaking through my pajamas for the fourth time now. So, it seems to be related more to nighttime than anything else.

attribution.explanation: The planner incorrectly authorized the disclosure of the fact about night sweats, which should have been withheld.
